title: Flintronic Cut Resistant Gloves - M for Kids & Adults - Level 5 Protection, Food Grade Work Cut Proof Gloves, EN 388 Certified
features: 【MAXIMUM PROTECTION】Highest CE EN388 Class 5 cut resistance certification, made of the highest level of cut-resistant material on the market, it will reduces the risk of serious injury by 90%, provides maximum protection for you and your child during daily activities.

【HIGH QUALITY MATERIAL】The cut-resistant gloves are made of new super-strength fiber material polyethylene fiber, which has strong anti-cut, waterproof and wear-resistant properties. And our gloves are 100% safe for food preparation and handling without any food safety concerns.

【EXCELLENT COMFORT】The work gloves are made of elastic and skin friendly material, comfortable, slim and light, with lateral knitting technology, the grip is great, your gloves will not slip, fall off or irritate your skin.

【EASY TO CLEAN】After using cut-resistant gloves, hand washing is recommended. Or throw them in the dishwasher or washing machine with soapy water, then hang them up to air dry. Then it can be used again.

【WIDELY USED】Work gloves are specially designed for children and women in daily work and at home to protect you from hand injuries. They are especially suitable for kitchens, carpentry and gardens. Suitable for men, women, children and everyone who is responsible for cutting food or cutting materials with a knife. Including fishing, cutting meat, peeling fruit, carving. Wood, automatic recovery. Congestion, repairing machinery, etc.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page ULTRA BREATHABLE Made of polyethylene and spandex, it is lightweight, breathable and comfortable next to the skin. SOFT BUT DURABLE Excellent flexibility, fits all fingers comfortably, reduces hand fatigue caused by long working hours. AMBIDEXTROUS DESIGN It is ambidextrous and easy to use. Suitable for gardening, landscaping, construction, agriculture, DIY, etc. WASHABLE Recommend washing gloves in slightly warm water not exceeding 40°C. A mild non-ionic detergent should be used.
